articles.title: 50 On Waking
articles.author: Christie Lund Coles
articles.text:
I tried to ease my aching heart,
And turned from love away;
I never once remembered you
The first monotonous day!

I schooled my heart and trained my thoughts
So very well! At length
I took a stroll down memory's lane,
Just to test my strength.

Weighted to a burden,
Sharpened to a pain,
Love with its hurting
Is in my heart again.
